---
title: "repaso-2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

```{r}
setwd("/home/diego/Desktop/stats-class/datasets") # Cambiamos de directorio
getwd() # Comprobar ruta nueva (carpeta de datasets, donde accederemos a nuestro archivo csv)
DFO <- read.csv("mayorista.csv") # Leemos el CSV
DF <- DFO # Pasamos el dataframe original a un nuevo dataframe, sobre el cual se realizará la limpieza
```

```{r}
sd(DF$EDAD[DF$GENERO=="M"])/mean(DF$EDAD[DF$GENERO=="M"])
sd(DF$PRECIO[DF$GENERO=="F"])/mean(DF$PRECIO[DF$GENERO=="F"])
mean(DF$PRECIO[DF$GENERO == "F"])
quantile(DF$PRECIO, probs=0.7)
table(DF$ITEM)

sd(DF$EDAD[DF$DISTRITO=="SURCO"])/mean(DF$EDAD[DF$DISTRITO=="SURCO"])
sd(DF$EDAD[DF$DISTRITO=="SAN_BORJA"])/mean(DF$EDAD[DF$DISTRITO=="SAN_BORJA"])
sd(DF$EDAD[DF$DISTRITO=="LA_MOLINA"])/mean(DF$EDAD[DF$DISTRITO=="LA_MOLINA"])
sd(DF$EDAD[DF$DISTRITO=="SAN_ISIDRO"])/mean(DF$EDAD[DF$DISTRITO=="SAN_ISIDRO"])

sum(DF$PRECIO > mean(DF$PRECIO))
sum(DF$EDAD[DF$GENERO == "F"] > median(DF$EDAD[DF$GENERO == "F"]))
```

![](images/clipboard-4009825975.png)

foo \<- df %\>% group_by(ITEM) %\>% summarise(MN = mean(PRECIO))
